name: Den Core synthetic architecture analysis
description: Read-only 72 KB codebase packet with 12 planted architectural, correctness, concurrency, contract, and operational issues plus four valid decoys.

input.prompt: Act as a senior software architect. Inspect repo-packet.md using the available local tools and identify the most important concrete architectural, correctness, concurrency, contract, operational, security, and maintainability problems. This is a read-only review: do not modify any file. For every evidence.path, use the embedded source path printed in its `## src/...`, `## tests/...`, or `## docs/...` heading; do not use `repo-packet.md` as the evidence path. Cite line ranges and short source quotes. Distinguish genuine issues from intentional compatibility or normal framework patterns. Return ONLY one JSON object with a findings array. Each finding must contain title, category, severity (critical|high|medium|low|info), confidence (0..1), evidence (an array of {path, lines, quote}), diagnosis, impact, fix, and fix_scope. Return no more than 16 findings and keep the complete JSON under 24000 characters.
